description: Audit teacher/student lesson and milestone alignment unit by unit, then amend teacher data to match the implemented student curriculum
deviation_notes: Phases 3 and 4 were no-ops (all units passed after Phase 2 fixes). Added 3 tasks to Phase 5 for verification gates and memory updates. Original plan targeted Unit 08 as first repair; audit found Unit 08 clean with blockers in Units 06 and 07.
